name: Golf Science Center At Ballers Social Sports
about: The Christian Dahl Golf Science Center is an indoor golf instruction facility located within Ballers Social Sports Center in Philadelphia. It features four GOLFZON simulators, an indoor short game green, and comprehensive golf training programs. The venue offers simulator sessions for rounds of golf or practice, golf lessons, and various swing analysis services. Operating hours are daily from 7 AM to 10 PM, catering to both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game through advanced technology and professional instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: GOLFZON simulators with advanced 3D course modeling
Professional swing analysis and biomechanics instruction
Indoor short game green for comprehensive practice
Flexible pricing options with peak and off-peak times
Ability to play 303 global golf courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Four top-line simulators with auto-tees and contoured surfaces

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Standard clubs are included, but demo clubs are available for an additional fee of $30.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified, but the venue is open from 7 AM to 10 PM daily.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family-friendly services and is open to golfers of all ages.
